programme.title: E104 - Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: E737 - Long Train Journey
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: E403 - The Chicken Circus!
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Darington are in the front row for the amazing Chicken Circus! But when Crusher accidentally launches the chickens far, far away, it's up to Blaze and Darington to get their feathered friends back to the big top!

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E125 - The Crew Builds A Parking Garage / The Crew Builds A Campsite
programme.desc: The Crew helps with a parking problem when Cafe Carl's ice cream machine brings lots of cars to Builder Cove. // When Rubble's fear of the dark derails the pup's Bark Yard campout, the Crew comes up with an idea to help him enjoy the starry night.

programme.title: E823 - Pups Save The Floating Goodways / Pups Save The Portable Pet Wash
programme.desc: The Goodways drift out to sea on a swan shaped float and need rescued from a flock of real swans aiming to protect the giant inflatable. // Mayor Humdinger steals Katie's Portable Pet Wash and ends up causing bubble trouble all over town.

programme.title: E748 - Super Potato
programme.desc: Mr. Potato has come to visit the playgroup and he's brought along his superhero friend, Super Potato!

programme.title: E406 - Breaking The Ice
programme.desc: When a little bunny gets trapped on top of a melting glacier, Blaze must put his new robot powers to the test as he races to the rescue.

programme.title: E116 - Hiccupism / Silence Please
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: E101 - Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: E402 - Mito Dreams Of La Playa / Snake Bike
programme.desc: Dora helps her friend Mito the Yeti see the beach for the first time and he even wins the sandcastle competition! // On her way to the new bike park, Dora teaches Selena the Snake how to ride a bicycle.

USA - The War Against Women's Rights
programme.desc: This film shows the dramatic state of women's rights in the USA, today. Radical abortion bans and the unequal treatment of women and men by the justice system are leading to massive restrictions on fundamental rights.

E157 - The Founder/The Schooling
programme.desc: When Nicole decides to pay the cable bill in person at Chanax , she leaves specific instructions for Richard to stay in the car. However he's far too tempted by the vending machine in the foyer to follow her advice. Chanax believes Richard is their mysterious founder and follow his every whim, leading to their inevitable demise.

programme.title: E105 - The Code/The Test/The Loophole/The Fuss/The News
programme.desc: Gumball learns that the Wattersons have been stealing Mr Robinson's wi-fi for years. When it goes down they try and live without it, but life offline proves too hard, Gumball and Darwin decide to hack their way through cyberspace to learn Mr Robinson's passcode.

programme.title: E101 - Brother And Son/The Fuzzy Future
programme.desc: Today is the premiere of Galaxy Revengers, Part 2! But Mo's father needs him for a photo shooting… The only way to be in both places at the same time: the power of teleportation!

programme.title: E307 - Their Draconic Majesty's Request
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: E10 - I'll Take The Couch
programme.desc: The leader of the Wolf Soldiers of the 4th Water Principal long-time allies of Hiro's clan needs a place to hide out and the Stitt house seems the perfect choice.

programme.title: E125 - All Wet/And Xingo Was His Name-O/The Night Ben Tennyson Came To Town/Beware The Scare
programme.desc: No one believes Ben when he insists that one of the other patrons, waiting in line at the World of Wet Water Park, is the nefarious Frightwig disguised as a common girl so Ben must prove his case while protecting park-goers from her master plan: to destroy the park with its own water pressure!

programme.title: E414 - Magic Marker/Theatre Night/Some Kind Of Magic
programme.desc: After failing to capture Lamput with their gadgets, the Docs turn to magic. They buy a magic marker that can give them any superpower they draw on their skin.

programme.title: E329 - Musical Battle/Day And Night/Tilted Lemings
programme.desc: Grizzy comes home and discovers the Lemmings dancing madly and throws them into the jungle where they meet a parrot that can reproduce any sound. The bird becomes their ally to distract Grizzy and recover their musical equipment.

programme.title: E2 - A Gamble On The Weather
programme.desc: A father in Manila Bay strains to protect his family from the ever-rising tide.

programme.title: E3 - Philippines Organic Farming Kids
programme.desc: A remote school in the town of Dumingag, Zamboanga Del Sur has resorted to an unique curriculum to help their students earn a living.

programme.desc: In Kerala's lush green Western Ghats, farmers battle with challenges to grow the precious 'green gold' of cardamom.

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - Ultimate Predator
programme.desc: Stalk the seas with sharks as they hunt using heightened senses and killer instincts. Watch a whitetip reef shark put its electrical sensors to work finding its prey’s heartbeat, and the pelagic thresher shark stun its quarry with its whiplike tail.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E2 - Summer
programme.desc: Feel the heat of summer’s arrival as supersize sea snails try to fend off an invading gang of coral-hungry starfish. Accompany reef sharks as they prowl for a midnight meal and marvel at the slippery disguise a parrotfish uses to survive the night.

programme.title: E1 - Ultimate Predator
programme.desc: Stalk the seas with sharks as they hunt using heightened senses and killer instincts. Watch a whitetip reef shark put its electrical sensors to work finding its prey’s heartbeat, and the pelagic thresher shark stun its quarry with its whiplike tail.

programme.title: E1 - Koala Country
programme.desc: Despite being one of Australia’s best-known marsupials, koalas live only in the east and southeast parts of the continent. Learn how their lives and behaviors vary in these different regions.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.title: E1 - Collisions
programme.desc: Observe the natural and human forces that have shaped Ningaloo Reef, Cape Range, and Exmouth Gulf with Tim, Traditional Owners, and other experts. Check out a million-year-old fossil reef, a gargantuan fish, and a ray that packs quite a punch.

programme.title: E1 - A Summer to Remember
programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.desc: Dive into a busy summer at the RSPCA Wildlife Hospital, where vet Emily takes the pressure off a gassy koala mum. Shadow the team as they fight a wave of lorikeet paralysis syndrome and see vet Karina use a teddy bear to rescue a flying fox pup.

programme.desc: With the heat reaching 126 degrees, King of the Swamp Troy relies on his ingenuity to find the coolest water in the bayou. Jacob risks losing his entire day's catch as he runs his lines in reverse.

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E11 - Takeout Drugs
programme.desc: A man leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen mail truck. A restaurant owner is arrested after hiding drugs in a takeout box. A pizza delivery guy helps the cops arrest a thief; and more.

programme.title: E495 - Out Of Options & The Reunion
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Det. White needs a former student to tell the truth about a shooting at an apartment complex. In Gwinnett, a man is shot in front of his friend as a robbery takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: E1 - Emperor Penguins
programme.desc: Andy takes Kip on a wild adventure to see emperor penguins in Antarctica. He huddles up in a group of penguins to try and stay warm, and even finds a cosy spot under one of the parents.

programme.title: E1 - Emperor Penguins
programme.desc: Andy takes Kip on a wild adventure to see emperor penguins in Antarctica. He huddles up in a group of penguins to try and stay warm, and even finds a cosy spot under one of the parents.

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E4 - What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E3 - Heart Of Gold
programme.desc: Toby's passengers can't stop making fun of him, that is until he discovers two villains trying to steal King Godred's crown.

programme.title: E28 - Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E16 - Robotato
programme.desc: Evil Pea has trapped Supertato and replaced him with an evil robot lookalike called Robotato.

programme.desc: When Egg, the cheeky little chick, goes on the run again, Duggee whistles to get him back. Hang on a minute Duggee, what was that noise? A whistle? The squirrels want to learn how to whistle.

programme.desc: It is a lovely day and the squirrels are playing outside. They are playing the shape game. Working out which shape goes where is quite tricky.

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E15 - Finale
programme.desc: It’s the final showdown and the top three chefs must create the best four course meal of their lives. And if the pressure isn't already high enough, Tom reveals in a twisted turn of events only two chefs will get the chance to serve their full menu. The internationally star-studded table of diners includes Deputy Editor of FOOD & WINE Magazine Melanie Hansche, acclaimed chefs Mitsuharu Tsumura, Alexander Smalls, Dan Hong, May Chow, and Alvin Leung, along with Tom, Padma, Nilou and Graham. In one of the most competitive contests of artistry and skill, only one chef will emerge victorious and be named Top Chef.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Goblet Of Fire
programme.desc: A competition will be held between three schools of wizardry. The Goblet of Fire makes its final selection for the competition - Harry Potter.

programme.title: E15 - Finale
programme.desc: It’s the final showdown and the top three chefs must create the best four course meal of their lives. In one of the most competitive contests of artistry and skill, only one chef will emerge victorious and be named Top Chef.

programme.title: A Dog Year
programme.desc: A 50-something writer in a mid-existential crisis impulsively adopts a collie. The bond between him and the dog transforms in meaningful, unexpected ways.

programme.desc: If Chowder can survive making a very complicated dish, he's on his way to becoming a chef.

programme.desc: During a seemingly normal delivery, Chowder's gut instincts lead him and Mung on a non-stop adventure.

E470
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.
PHOENIX MIDDAY EXPRESS: Presenting the most update international and financial news breaking before lunch, viewers can turn it to stay informed about events happening around the world.

programme.title: E1488
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E478
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E223
programme.desc: CHINA INSIGHT: China Insight is a captivating series that offers foreign hosts the opportunity to travel and observe the dynamic scenes of China's contemporary society. The series aims to showcase the significant transformations taking place in various aspects such as politics, economy, technology, and culture.
Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.

programme.title: E471
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E478
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E154
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. programme.title: Hogie Goes to Hong Kong
programme.desc: The gang goes to celebrate the Chinese New Year in Hong Kong and meets Bo, who is incredibly worried that he has lost his good luck. They try all sorts of traditions and superstitions to help him find his luck, but Hogie has another idea that might help him out.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: Magnificent Beast
programme.desc: Xavier battles to keep up with the baby barn owl's voracious appetite. Laura answers a cry for help about a dog called Bear that looks like a horse and plays like a tiger.

programme.title: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: The Junior Vets need to find out why Tino, the horse, can't walk properly. They help remove a large lump from the throat of Zoe, the Schnauzer dog. And Pollux, the alpaca, is going bald - can the Junior Vets get to the bottom of the problem?

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: When an iceberg brings an emperor penguin and his egg into the Bay, Darwin and Newts help him get home.

programme.title: Party Like it's 1859
programme.desc: When the team's high-tech dance party is threatened by a power outage, they're frustrated and fly off to find a place where things are still normal. Mistakenly, they end up at a historic village, where they live like it's 150 years ago!

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Squeeze
programme.desc: When the team wants a new water slide for the clubhouse beach, they decide to fund it by selling Anabella's delicious lemonade. But the slide costs a lot, and they want it fast! So how can they sell as much lemonade as possible? They split into two teams.

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: Day of the Super Fan
programme.desc: Ricky start to receive gifts from a super fan while, mysteriously, loads of stuff begin to disappear from his flat. Ricky makes a shiny selfie and a squirty flower. But with his flat nearly empty, will he finally recover his furniture and uncover his mystery fan?

programme.title: Hogie Goes to St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Hogie and his friends travel to St. Petersburg in Russia and meet Pavel, who is getting ready to film one of the biggest events in the summer festival. But will the new friends be able to find the perfect spot for the perfect camera shot?

programme.title: What's so Great About Mould?
programme.desc: There are thousands of known species of mould, but they all feed off organic material and need moisture to survive. They play a vital role in returning nutrients back to ecosystems. One type, penicillin, has saved countless lives since it was used as an antibiotic.

programme.title: Beware the Sentinels
programme.desc: A mysterious, ancient temple beneath the sea has been hidden for centuries. The Nektons discover there is a very good reason for that.

programme.title: Flying Saucer
programme.desc: Robbie and Naomi are abducted by inquisitive aliens while in the park, and the other kids have to figure out a way to rescue them from the hovering spacecraft.

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: The First Time In Forever
programme.desc: Hot off her amazing success at the Junior European Championships, artistic gymnast Amelie has been selected for the European Championships, where she will be competing as part of the senior female team.

programme.title: Party Like it's 1859
programme.desc: When the team's high-tech dance party is threatened by a power outage, they're frustrated and fly off to find a place where things are still normal. Mistakenly, they end up at a historic village, where they live like it's 150 years ago!

programme.title: Team Doki's Big Squeeze
programme.desc: When the team wants a new water slide for the clubhouse beach, they decide to fund it by selling Anabella's delicious lemonade. But the slide costs a lot, and they want it fast! So how can they sell as much lemonade as possible? They split into two teams.

programme.title: What's so Great About Mould?
programme.desc: There are thousands of known species of mould, but they all feed off organic material and need moisture to survive. They play a vital role in returning nutrients back to ecosystems. One type, penicillin, has saved countless lives since it was used as an antibiotic.

programme.title: Trip to India
programme.desc: For hamsters' day, Zoe and Milo want to surprise Alim by making confetti to throw on their little friend. But Alim knows a place on earth where people celebrate by throwing something more interesting than confetti up in the air. Our heroes land in Rajasthan, India.

programme.title: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: The Junior Vets need to find out why Tino, the horse, can't walk properly. They help remove a large lump from the throat of Zoe, the Schnauzer dog. And Pollux, the alpaca, is going bald - can the Junior Vets get to the bottom of the problem?

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E8 - Legacy
programme.desc: A family of conservationists capture and study elephants in Zimbabwe.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E4 - A 300 ton-Journey
programme.desc: Super heavy, super high and super wide. Autoclaves are the names of the metal giants in which aircraft parts are to be produced from a wide variety of materials under extreme pressure and heat. But it is a long and dangerous way to get there. The two autoclaves weigh over 300 tonnes and have to be transported over a distance of 100 kilometres. A challenge that is anything but easy and involves many risks and hurdles. It is a single obstacle course. From overhead cables hanging too low at level crossings, to bridges that cannot withstand the weight, to narrow roads and steep inclines. And all this in miserable weather and slush. It is a battle for centimetres, there's not a second to lose attention, not an obstacle to be overlooked.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E12 - Christmas in August
programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E11 - Digging Deep
programme.desc: Robin uncovers a massive jade lens at Two Mile, but it might be too big for their small operation to dig out.

programme.title: E12 - Christmas in August
programme.desc: When a freak August snowstorm strands Claudia and Robin at Two Mile, Gary and Garon try to save the day by driving through the storm to bring them supplies but they wind up needing rescuing themselves.

programme.title: E4 - A 300 ton-Journey
programme.desc: Super heavy, super high and super wide. Autoclaves are the names of the metal giants in which aircraft parts are to be produced from a wide variety of materials under extreme pressure and heat. But it is a long and dangerous way to get there. The two autoclaves weigh over 300 tonnes and have to be transported over a distance of 100 kilometres. A challenge that is anything but easy and involves many risks and hurdles. It is a single obstacle course. From overhead cables hanging too low at level crossings, to bridges that cannot withstand the weight, to narrow roads and steep inclines. And all this in miserable weather and slush. It is a battle for centimetres, there's not a second to lose attention, not an obstacle to be overlooked.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E8 - Kick the Bucket-List
programme.desc: For a thrill-seeking grandfather of two, there’s no such thing as retiring from life, but leave it to Bear Grylls to surprise even the most experienced adventurer. Together, they go full throttle to fulfill Art’s bucket list and capture a story worth telling his grandson back home.

programme.title: E8 - Legacy
programme.desc: A family of conservationists capture and study elephants in Zimbabwe.

E27
programme.desc: 以美食為介質的全新文化訪談類節目，每集邀請文化名人、名廚大師、外籍帥哥、直播網紅和民間饕客一同做客飯局，在品嚐民間美味的同時，分享人生故事。

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？
programme.desc: 熟齡戀愛旅居真人秀，10位性格各異、魅力全開的50+熟齡男女，帶著一顆敢愛的心，從大理到泰國，在日落時分開啟一段愛情之旅，一同打破恐老焦慮，傳遞歲月從不敗熱愛的生活態度。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E11 - 英倫男被三女圍攻？

programme.desc: The Bluejam Pirates surround the boys at Gray Terminal, and hand Sabo over to his father, who hired them to do so.

programme.title: Mr Vampire Saga 4
programme.desc: The Buddhist Monk and the Taoist Priest, both blessed with ghost-taming powers, have been quarrelling all over the landscape. Still, they are good friends. The Priest shepherds a group of corpses home. He has to fight off some vicious devils. The Priest's classmate has been assigned the job of accompanying the coffin of a prince back to the capital. One night, a thunderbolt rips the coffin and the prince becomes a vampire. He kills many people. The Priest asks to help. He finds his classmate has killed himself...

programme.title: The Dragon Chronicles The Maidens of Heavenly Mountains
programme.desc: The one who solves hermit Ding's chess game will become the grand master of martial arts. A shaolin young monk must solve the complex game to forestall great calamity...

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: Master Q 2001
programme.desc: Master Q and Potato fail the job interview in a school, they then go to find Wong for revenge. But Wong has already retired, so he gives Master Q a secret pouch. Fung is a CID. He is in love with Miss Cheung. But Cheung's mother, the District Councilor, is against it. Uncle Kam believes in some crooks that Fung is going to be the head of the police force in the future. Kam wants to bribe him under his wing for business in the future...

programme.title: Mad Phoenix
programme.desc: The movie bases itself on the life of 'Naam Hoi Sap Saam Long' who was a gifted, famed and productive playwright in the 1930s.

programme.title: E9 - Narco Islands
programme.desc: From South America to the Solomon Islands, Foreign Correspondent reveals the tactics used by cartels to send eye-watering quantities of drugs across the Pacific. We go on the hunt for the 'narco subs' used by drug lords.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: E5 - Dear Prime Minister
programme.desc: As a child, Satara wrote to the Pope asking why women couldn't lead the Church. Now as Australia's 2025 UN Youth Representative, she takes letters from incarcerated youth to the world stage in New York.

programme.title: E5 - Spies In The Outback - The Secrets Of Pine Gap
programme.desc: The terror attacks of 9/11 change the world and cement Pine Gap's role in wars on the other side of the world. We hear just how far Pine Gap's reach is today and uncover the secrets of its stolen land. (Final)

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Thanh visits the biggest mushroom farm in Australia and compares their produce to wild foraged pine mushrooms, all to be enjoyed using an unconventional cooking approach.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat To My Family
programme.desc: When Ryan's sister, Serena, escapes from a dangerous cult, she seeks refuge with his family to rebuild her life. Ryan's wife, Marielle, is suspicious of Serena and doesn't believe she's truly reformed.

programme.title: E9 - Soupless Chicken Soup & Carrot Sweet Potato Cake
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: E9 - Soupless Chicken Soup & Carrot Sweet Potato Cake
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: E5 - Baby John's Big Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some big outdoor adventures with Baby John! First, Dad makes sure the family is prepared with the proper clothes, first aid & food. Then, the family enters a sandcastle competition, where Baby John, Jack & Jill work together to build a giant sand turtle! The fun continues as the family goes camping, but nighttime is a little scary! Mom & Dad show the kids there's nothing to be afraid of, especially with the beautiful stars to look at!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!
programme.desc: Get ready for the most unpredictable magic mishaps! First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. Then, Professor Paula's new youth serum is accidentally spilled on Mila, turning her into a baby! Now Morphle has to look after baby Mila while an antidote is created. The mishaps continue as giant bubbles carry away citizens & a giant living doll causes chaos!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E5 - Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready to make, play & learn with JJ! First, find out what JJ's favorite pizza toppings are as you sing along to this yummy adventure. Then, Dad shows JJ how to make a healthy & delicious snack: fresh fruit ice cream! The hands-on fun continues as TomTom shows JJ how to be a 'toy mechanic' & fix his favorite toy school bus when a wheel pops off. From learning about veggies to becoming 'Clean Machines,' it's a day of creative fun!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E4 - Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi is learning fun facts all about the world! He & D.BO shrink down to meet Ernie the Eraser, an aspiring magician who teaches them the science behind how erasers work. Then, they fly into the night sky to learn how fireworks get their colors & why some animals, like raccoons, prefer to come out at night. The adventure continues as Blippi learns how to be a cowboy in the desert & helps a brave spoon protect his cereal from getting soggy!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E16 - JJ's Fun Day of Sports & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun day of sports & play with JJ! He discovers the fun of putting on shoes & sliding at the playground. Then, sing 'Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes' while learning body parts! The active fun continues with a competitive soccer match against animal friends & a team sports day at the field. Plus, learn swimming skills on a hot day & go on an exciting ski trip with Ms. Appleberry & the class!

programme.title: E2 - The Most Unpredictable Magic Mishaps!

First, Magic Pet Chroma accidentally takes away all the colors from the city, & Morphle must morph into a magic paintbrush to paint them all back. programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E4 - Part 4
programme.desc: Despite a violent rebellion, the slave ship Lord Ligonier completes its voyage in 1767, and Kunta Kinte endures the indignity of an Annapolis slave auction.

programme.title: E17 - Peggy Loves AL, Yeah, Yeah, Yeah
programme.desc: All Peggy wants for Valentine’s Day is to hear unromantic Al utter those three little words - I love you.

programme.title: E18 - The Great Escape

programme.desc: Al finally comes into some money at the track, but hasn’t time to enjoy his winnings - he’s too busy hiding the loot from his family.

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan The Movie: Our Dinosaur Diary
programme.desc: Shinchan is really excited about the coming summer holiday! What's amazing about this summer is that there is a special news that shocks the whole world - A “Dinosaur Park” that revives extinct dinosaurs is opened in Tokyo! What's more, the Kasukabe Team receives a special invitation to explore the new park! The team enjoys the facilities in the world-renowned “Dinosaur Park” while having a close look on giant dinosaurs, and become so excited about everything they see! After opening of the park, a dinosaur fever is all the rage worldwide! At the same time, Shiro meets a little dinosaur called “Nana” at the riverside. As Shinchan and his friends beg sincerely, Nana becomes a member of the Nohara family, living together with Shinchan and Shiro, and creates a lot of wonderful memories. However, when Shinchan is enjoying this unique summer, dinosaurs suddenly escape from the park and rush into Tokyo! How will this “Dinosaur Crisis” end? What is the secret behind Nana's appearance

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: House of Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious person arrived in his wheelchair in Yue's Clinic and asked for a person called Tai Chi Lung. Later on, Yue was found disappeared, leaving behind his clinic a mess...

programme.title: Suzume
programme.desc: Suzume, a 17-year-old girl who lives in a quiet town in Kyushu, meets Souta, a young man looking for a door. Following Souta, Suzume finds an old door in the mountains and reaches out her hands towards the door as if pulled by something. This opened door will bring disaster; thus, Souta must travel around to lock the door to avoid disaster. But then, a mysterious kitten turns Souta into a broken wooden chair. To catch the kitten, Suzume and Souta follow it and travel from Kyushu to Tokyo. “Doors of disaster” begin to appear across Japan simultaneously, and Suzume needs to close and lock the doors one by one to stop the disasters. Unexpectedly, a forgotten truth is waiting for her.

programme.title: Turning Point
programme.desc: Brother Laughing is supposedly an undercover police officer who has infiltrated a triad organization. During a drug-trafficking operation he is caused by Superintendent Poon. Before he became a police officer, Brother Laughing was a member of the triads and worked for the big boss man No. 1. No. 1 was very good to Laughing, and Laughing looked up to No. 1 as his elder brother. In order to strengthen his business and illegal activities, No. 1 arranges for Laughing to join the Police Force and become his mole to gather information about the plans and counter-plans for operations by the police. Laughing graduated from Police Academy with outstanding results but before he was assigned to a post as a police officer, his “bad boy” image attracted the attention of the Head of District Anti-Triad Squad, Superintendent Sin who arranges his assignment as an undercover cop to infiltrate the mob syndicate. Laughing was now a “double” mole. No. 1 was happy with this turn of events as Laug

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.desc: Eric travels to Rhode Island to skish - a combination of ski and fishing - to land a striped bass. He'll free float miles from the coast armed only with a rod.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich.

programme.title: CNBC On Assignment
programme.desc: CNBC goes on assignment at the biggest events around the world, bringing you interviews and insight from the most influential leaders in business, politics, activism and the arts.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Jack Em Popoy: Da Puliscredibles[Live]
programme.desc: A mismatched trio of police officers-Jack, Popoy, and Emily-band together as the self‑styled “Puliscredibles” to combat organized crime in their community. Blending action, comedy, and family drama, the film follows their mission to dismantle a powerful criminal syndicate while uncovering hidden personal ties and long‑buried secrets that bind them together.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: Serie A Women 25/26 E59 -Roma v Ternana[Live]
Serie A Women 25/26 E59 -Roma v Ternana
E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Jamie shares a simple salmon dish perfect for a midweek meal, and some no-fuss fish cakes made from tins. He cooks a lamb Madras traybake, as well as a no-cook pasta sauce, and crowns it all off with a hot and crispy ice cream parcel!

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: In south London, Nick and the team step in to help a group of siblings grieving the recent loss of their mum.

programme.title: E7 - Tea And Coffee
programme.desc: Jason makes a splash with delicious recipes flavoured with tea and coffee, as well as getting a lesson in the do's and don'ts of serving a traditional Emirati cup of coffee. Chef Nick Alvis will be making a delicious sea bass and celeriac dish with a hibiscus infused cream sauce.

programme.desc: Glen Powell, Michelle Yeoh, Rosamund Pike, Colman Domingo and Jack Whitehall join Graham on his sofa. Ed Sheeran also joins the conversation after performing Camera from his album Play.

programme.desc: It's all about innovation as Gordon Ramsay invites the teams to create a cocktail in a can, then launch it at Henley Royal Regatta. Who will make the grade?

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes
programme.desc: A look back at the ready-to-wear shows for Autumn-Winter 2025-2026 from Mossi Traore to Paco Rabanne and Enfants Riches Deprimes. AI is making its mark in fashion as stylists, art directors and clothing designers. Le Chemin des Maquettes makes metal fashion pieces for some of the world's top designers.

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron
programme.desc: Wallonie picarde stop! Mouscron borders both France and the linguistic frontier: Aalbeke and Rekkem separate it from the Flemish region. Visits to the Marcel Marlier Centre, the creator of ''Martine'', the Castle of the Counts, the nature reserve, and the Blue Fountain.

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E13 - Weinsanto
programme.desc: Humour, fantasy and a flair for the spectacular all describe Victor Weinsanto's designs. He presents his autumn-winter 2023-2024 ready to wear show.

programme.title: E6 - Ready-To-Wear Fashion Shows/Ai In Fashion/Le Chemin Des Maquettes

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Highlights 2025/26 E33 -Tue,SFs,1st Leg
Le Mans Cup 2026 E3 -Le Castellet - Qualifying[Live]
E8 - Hindsight
programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. programme.title: E8 - Hindsight
programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Laparwah
programme.desc: Reckless Shera is hired by prowler Johnny to execute his plan to earn money by marrying wealthy Thakur's daughter Sandhya.
